name: Rand Paul
subject: Announcement: New Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

You and I have less than 15 hours before tonight's deadline, so I'll make this quick.

The newest CNN poll has me rising to 5th place -- ahead of Ted Cruz, Carly Fiorina, Chris Christie, and John Kasich.

But the mainstream media and the Washington Machine refuse to report our success.

They're doubling-down to drown out our message.

So, I'm fighting back -- hard.

**[That's why I need to count on you to chip in a contribution of $20.16 immediately](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31118205:WKfZ84mNy:m:1:879035888:47C783000CFC8442B93FAB2E6AA0C1F3:r)**.

My campaign has launched a bold and aggressive TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa to run during and after the next Republican presidential debate.

This TV and Radio Ad Blitz will allow my campaign to go straight to the voters with my message of Liberty.

I need to know you're still with me in this fight.

_Can I count on you to stand with me by chipping in an emergency contribution of $20.16 or whatever you can afford right now_?

The media likes to downplay or just flat-out ignore my grassroots driven campaign.

But the only way that happens is if liberty-loving Americans like you, Fellow Conservative, let them.

That's why I'm asking every one of my grassroots supporters to chip in with an emergency contribution to fight back.

This TV and Radio Ad Blitz will give me the vital resources to flex my campaign's grassroots muscle.

And national news outlets will be forced to recognize you, me and the message of Liberty and limited government aren't going anywhere.

**[So please let me know you're still with me in this fight by chipping in a contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31118205:WKfZ84mNy:m:1:879035888:47C783000CFC8442B93FAB2E6AA0C1F3:r)**.

I really need your support, Fellow Conservative.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31118206:WKfZ84mNy:m:1:879035888:47C783000CFC8442B93FAB2E6AA0C1F3:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31118207:WKfZ84mNy:m:1:879035888:47C783000CFC8442B93FAB2E6AA0C1F3:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31118208:WKfZ84mNy:m:1:879035888:47C783000CFC8442B93FAB2E6AA0C1F3:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31118209:WKfZ84mNy:m:1:879035888:47C783000CFC8442B93FAB2E6AA0C1F3:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31118205:WKfZ84mNy:m:1:879035888:47C783000CFC8442B93FAB2E6AA0C1F3:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31118205:WKfZ84mNy:m:1:879035888:47C783000CFC8442B93FAB2E6AA0C1F3:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31118210:WKfZ84mNy:m:1:879035888:47C783000CFC8442B93FAB2E6AA0C1F3:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31118211:WKfZ84mNy:m:1:879035888:47C783000CFC8442B93FAB2E6AA0C1F3:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31118212:WKfZ84mNy:m:1:879035888:47C783000CFC8442B93FAB2E6AA0C1F3:r)

name: Team Carson
subject: "Carson's 2016 Climb Continues"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31122941:sW3rY4m3N:m:1:876315805:6D4B28BFD8BAA054A7FDA94103D74197:r)
---

Peter,

"Carson's 2016 Climb Continues." That was yesterday's headline from NBC News after the release of their new poll with the Wall Street Journal. Dr. Carson is right on the heels of GOP frontrunner Donald Trump, 25-22.

Even more encouraging is the fact that a full three-quarters of GOP voters say they could see themselves supporting Dr. Carson.

In addition to this good news, a brand new poll released just this morning from CNN has Dr. Carson again in a strong second place (27-22), with no other candidates in double digits.

**The takeaway is simple -- we're in a strong position and momentum is on our side.**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31122941:sW3rY4m3N:m:1:876315805:6D4B28BFD8BAA054A7FDA94103D74197:r)
---
In addition to spreading Dr. Carson's message, we're working around the clock to expand our grassroots organization. It's vital that Dr. Carson appears on every single ballot in every state and territory, and that we have the ability to identify and turn out our supporters at the most local level.

Dr. Carson didn't get into this campaign to lick the boots of billionaires. This is a grassroots campaign fueled just a few dollars at a time by hardworking, everyday Americans.

We raised over $20 million last quarter, more than any Republican running. This was the result of over 400,000 people making small donations. In fact, our average donation is just $50. A few dollars goes a long way.

**[We're now in the 4th quarter of 2015. It's the final quarter before voting begins. Will you help us build on our momentum by donating just $4 right now?](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31122941:sW3rY4m3N:m:1:876315805:6D4B28BFD8BAA054A7FDA94103D74197:r)**

Dr. Carson shared a story the other day about a luncheon in Virginia. After his speech, a server named Brandi Bradshaw stood up and told the entire group why she supports Dr. Carson and unexpectedly donated $500 of her hard-earned money. Her gesture was incredibly inspiring.

Today, I'm not asking you to donate $500. I'm asking you to donate $4 to help us continue to build our grassroots movement of "We the People." Our country's future is at stake, and Dr. Carson is the right man at the right time to bring us together and get us back on track.

[**We're all in this together, and your support today would be much appreciated**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31122941:sW3rY4m3N:m:1:876315805:6D4B28BFD8BAA054A7FDA94103D74197:r).

Onward,

Team Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31122941:sW3rY4m3N:m:1:876315805:6D4B28BFD8BAA054A7FDA94103D74197:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31122942:sW3rY4m3N:m:1:876315805:6D4B28BFD8BAA054A7FDA94103D74197:r)
---
|
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31122943:sW3rY4m3N:m:1:876315805:6D4B28BFD8BAA054A7FDA94103D74197:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31122944:sW3rY4m3N:m:1:876315805:6D4B28BFD8BAA054A7FDA94103D74197:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31122945:sW3rY4m3N:m:1:876315805:6D4B28BFD8BAA054A7FDA94103D74197:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31122946:sW3rY4m3N:m:1:876315805:6D4B28BFD8BAA054A7FDA94103D74197:r)

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: This is it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

I know I've emailed you several times about this, but our TV and radio ad program I'm preparing to launch in Iowa is just that important.

With just hours left until midnight, my campaign is scrambling to meet our $200,000 goal.

**[Will you please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31128846:sbX4d4mNW:m:1:879035888:315A4AA5A3FB9CF8E3764059C2ACFAEC:r)**?

With Hillary Clinton and the GOP establishment's handpicked candidates floundering, the media would rather turn the race for the Republican nomination into a personality contest than one about issues.

After all, they know I have the record and the plans to shake the Washington Machine to its core if I'm elected President.

So they're going all-out to dismiss my campaign's growing grassroots momentum.

That's why I'm counting on your support to help me go right to the voters before, after and during the next Republican debate.

But I have to reach my campaign's $200,000 fundraising goal to get there.

We're so close.

**[Please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more at once](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31128846:sbX4d4mNW:m:1:879035888:315A4AA5A3FB9CF8E3764059C2ACFAEC:r)**!

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31128847:sbX4d4mNW:m:1:879035888:315A4AA5A3FB9CF8E3764059C2ACFAEC:r)
---

[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31128849:sbX4d4mNW:m:1:879035888:315A4AA5A3FB9CF8E3764059C2ACFAEC:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31128850:sbX4d4mNW:m:1:879035888:315A4AA5A3FB9CF8E3764059C2ACFAEC:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31128846:sbX4d4mNW:m:1:879035888:315A4AA5A3FB9CF8E3764059C2ACFAEC:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31128846:sbX4d4mNW:m:1:879035888:315A4AA5A3FB9CF8E3764059C2ACFAEC:r)

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Petition: Debt deadline coming
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

If Congress doesn't act by November 3rd, the American economy could default. Congress needs to take action to ensure that America can pay its bills.

But now there are Republicans in Washington saying they won't make a move unless Democrats agree to weaken Medicare and Social Security.

Medicare and Social Security are vital programs for seniors. Medicare provides coverage for life-saving medical care, prescription drugs, and doctor's visits. Social Security keeps millions of seniors from falling into poverty. We cannot weaken these programs for any reason.

[**Congress can 't refuse to pay our debt -- and we can't put seniors at risk. If you agree, let Congress know. Sign our petition today.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2173/738133e4/3a45f1a9/7f80bab2/1872322018/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151019")

I'd like to be clear about this -- when we discuss the debt ceiling, we're not talking about new spending. **We 're talking about paying America's debts on money already spent.**

Florida families have to pay their bills every month. When your credit card bill comes in, you have to pay it. You don't get to bargain with the card company, or set conditions. You've spent the money. You have to pay it back.

**The same goes for the country.** America has never defaulted on its debt. We cannot start now. And we cannot tangle the security of seniors into this.

[**Sign our open letter to Congress and let them know where you stand.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2173/738133e4/3a45f1a9/7f80bab2/1872322018/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151019")

I won't let anyone threaten the security of our seniors. Thank you for standing with me.

Patrick | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2173/738133e4/3a45f1a9/7f80bab3/1872322018/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2173/738133e4/3a45f1a9/7f80baac/1872322018/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Vote Now: Who is the scariest Democrat?
body:
Hillary? Bernie? Biden? Who is the scariest Democrat? | |

---
---
|
Friend,

This Halloween, the scariest thing you will see and hear won't be goblins and zombies...it will be what the Democrat Presidential candidates have to say:

**Higher taxes. Free government-mandated health care. More cuts to military. And more...**

I shudder to think what will happen to our nation if another Democrat is elected to the White House - essentially a third term of Barack Obama.

So, Friend, I want to know: as Halloween approaches, [**who is the scariest Democrat?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31131032:Wrga74mKN:m:1:877327319:FD253930A003B3E9A5C16CE8220AE326:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31131032:Wrga74mKN:m:1:877327319:FD253930A003B3E9A5C16CE8220AE326:r)

Is it Hillary with her plan to raise taxes and preserve Obamacare? Is it Bernie with his plan to openly socialize our nation and weaken our military? Or is it Joe Biden's looming presidential bid and the threat of his liberal policies that gives you the spooks?

[**Friend: follow this link right now to let me know who you think is the scariest Democrat!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31131032:Wrga74mKN:m:1:877327319:FD253930A003B3E9A5C16CE8220AE326:r)

Thanks for voting, and Happy Halloween a few days early!

Lindsey Graham

P.S. We cannot allow the Democrats to secure a third term in the White House. Not only can I defeat the Democrats and their scary liberal policies, but I am the only candidate ready to be Commander in Chief on day one. [**Please let me know which Democrat you think is the scariest. clean_body: Hillary? Bernie? Biden? Who is the scariest Democrat? | | | Friend, This Halloween, the scariest thing you will see and hear won't be goblins and zombies...it will be what the Democrat Presidential candidates have to say: Higher taxes. Free government-mandated health care. More cuts to military. And more... I shudder to think what will happen to our nation if another Democrat is elected to the White House - essentially a third term of Barack Obama. So, Friend, I want to know: as Halloween approaches, Is it Hillary with her plan to raise taxes and preserve Obamacare? Is it Bernie with his plan to openly socialize our nation and weaken our military? Or is it Joe Biden's looming presidential bid and the threat of his liberal policies that gives you the spooks? Thanks for voting, and Happy Halloween a few days early! Lindsey Graham P.S. We cannot allow the Democrats to secure a third term in the White House. name: Rand Paul
subject: Fellow Conservative, there are just 4 hours left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Real quick, Fellow Conservative --

A newly released CNN poll shows me rising to 5th place -- yet another confirmation of the strength of our movement and the grassroots infrastructure of my campaign.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31132446:s0ec34mFN:m:1:879035888:0474F246D772647466541217CAC82B0A:r)

That's why I'm emailing you (again), so you know how important it is that we build on this momentum and take full advantage of my TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa.

It's critical that my campaign has the resources to go directly to the voters with my message of Liberty -- despite the media's blackout.

But the midnight deadline is under 4 hours away. And I'm still short of reaching my $200,000 goal.

**[So please let me know you're still with me in this fight by chipping in a contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31132446:s0ec34mFN:m:1:879035888:0474F246D772647466541217CAC82B0A:r)**.

Thank you in advance for your continued support.

\-- Rand Paul

name: Madeleine Albright
subject: the truth about glass ceilings:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Hillary needs her team by her side. | Friend --

I know a little something about shattering glass ceilings -- and so does Hillary Clinton. But here’s the truth: Breaking the glass ceiling isn't even half the battle. What's much more important is what you do once you’re on the other side.

I've known Hillary for decades, so I know that if she becomes our next president, she will fight harder for women and girls than any occupant of the White House ever has. After all, that's what she did as Secretary of State.

**But she won't get the chance unless women fight for her. That's why I'm a member of Women for Hillary. Will you join me?**

| [ | [**Count me in**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM3OTM1MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDUyNDEwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM3OTM1MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDUyNDEwS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Women deserve a president like Hillary. Let’s do our part to make sure she gets there.

Thank you,

Madeleine Albright

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjM3OTM1MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDUyNDEwS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjM3OTM1MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDUyNDEwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM3OTM1MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDUyNDEwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM3OTM1MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDUyNDEwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM3OTM1MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDUyNDEwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM3OTM1MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDUyNDEwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM3OTM1MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyMDUyNDEwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
